## Source: amazon-inspector (a6b7c067c478263090ed1c2af69f93fb08ed460a91f5e70203c0de2037710507)
The package bytefrontier-partner was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (d271c5a87554c0cd5b76476e42c6bd33507d9873da12b465c4eb7c19b73eeeda)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bytefrontier-partner' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
